enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a casual daily vlog update covering his afternoon work session, exploring Google Earth while studying Rome, downloading cycling race videos to watch while riding his stationary bike, and noting he finished the History of Byzantium podcast (which appears abandoned) and started History of England.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Happily addicted to it; genuinely wants to understand what Rome looks like
Disappointed it appears abandoned before covering the fall of Constantinople
Plans to watch race footage while riding his bike as immersive entertainment
